title: Settings
subtitle: Customise your language, region, and appearance.

language.label: Language
language.description: Updates UI text and TMDB content language.

region.label: Region
region.description: Affects regional availability and release data from TMDB.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Switch between light and dark mode.

logout.label: Sign out
logout.description: End your current session on this device.
